text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 91 

MDCR_MC_PTA_PTB_CAPTD_SPEND 

LABEL: Medicare PTA/PTB Managed Care Capitated Payment Amount — Total 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is total capitated premium payment amount for Medicare Part A and Part B for the 
beneficiary during the year. Note that only Part A and B capitated payments are included (not Part D). 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS Medicare Advantage Prescription Drug System (MARx) data (derived)
